fields.name: Old Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension that is currently defined as Global Dimension 1.

fields.name: Old Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension that is currently defined as Global Dimension 2.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies another global dimension that you want to use. The second field on the row will show the current global dimension.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies another global dimension that you want to use. The second field on the row will show the current global dimension.

fields.name: Parallel Processing
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the change will be processed by parallel background jobs.
